steps.title: Use the availability clue
steps.content: Video cameras became affordable for ordinary consumers in the 1970s, giving artists capabilities that had previously been available only to broadcasters. The blank should describe access that artists had only recently gained.

steps.title: Choose recently gained access
steps.content: B describes fragility, C describes inevitability, and D describes something regular or long-established. The context instead points to access that had just become available. The answer is A.
